name: Kreska
description: This unsophisticated Corpus survival tool does what it was designed for: hacking and splitting whatever it strikes.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This unsophisticated Corpus survival tool does what it was designed for: hacking and splitting whatever it strikes.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Longwinder Lathe Coagulant
components.description:
A liquid that mixes with coolant fluid to produce a resilient gel that repairs leaks.

Source: Dismantled from Longwinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Longwinder in Orb Vallis lake hotspots during Warm weather.

components.name: Mytocardia Spore
components.description:
A fungal body prized for its varied uses.

Location: Orb Vallis on Venus

components.name: Star Amarast
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kreska not giving any Clan Affinity after being Researched in the Dojo. This Affinity will magically appear after successfully Researching another item.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Fieldron crafting requirements for the Kreska, Ocucor, and Battacor from 20 to 10.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: *Research for the Kreska, Ocucor, and Battacor can be found in the Dojo Energy Lab, or in the Market for Platinum.
